name: Cranapana Bread (Original)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the first six ingredients until well combined.
2. Gently fold in the cranberries, apple, walnuts, and raisins.
3. Grease a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes.
6. Optional: Mix together confectioners sugar and cream to make a glaze. Once cooled, spread over the top of the loaf.
Note:
Per unglazed slice: 195 Kcal, 5.2g fat (0.8g sat fat), 26% CFF, 262mg Na, 28mg cholesterol
